name: Native branch stock matrix UI
description: Use native Card + DataTable to render cross-branch stock quantities for referral visibility in product detail while preserving branch-scoped checkout/decrement behavior.

name: Phase 7 print compliance and image export
description: Receipt/invoice output now supports receipt-specific printing from sale detail, Save as Image via PDF rasterization, salesperson name rendering, and invoice print cleanup (no tax column section, no generated-by footer, no tenant email).

name: Phase 9 native UI standardization audit
description: Comprehensive file-by-file native widget replacement plan and loading-state standardization scope captured in dedicated audit doc.
